{{Quote|A bargain is a mober snake with a head at each end, Hutt Grappa. It is only safe if both ends are held.|[[Zzzanmxl]]|<ref name="CE3">[[Crimson Empire II: Council of Blood 3|''Crimson Empire II: Council of Blood'' 3]]</ref>}}
'''Mober snakes''' were deadly [[Reptile/Legends|reptiles]] with [[Poison/Legends|poisonous]] heads at both ends of its body.

==Appearances==
*[[Crimson Empire II: Council of Blood 3|''Crimson Empire II: Council of Blood'' 3]] {{1stm}}
